debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) ⇑f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖

rw [ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure]
  simp only [cfc_toComplexMeasure, compSL_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp,
    Function.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
    ContinuousLinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
  calc
    ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f‖
      ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg f)

rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_eq]
  simp only [cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.compSL_apply,
    ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap, ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
  calc
    ‖⟪x, cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f y⟫_ℂ‖
      ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f y‖ := norm_inner_le_norm x _
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * (‖cfcHom ha.isStarNormal f‖ * ‖y‖) :=
      mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (le_opNorm _ y) (norm_nonneg x)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by rw [norm_cfcHom a f]; ring

calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ ≤ ‖cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ :=
      ComplexMeasure.norm_integral_le_norm_norm _ _
    _ = ‖(cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y).comp (liftZeroAtInftyCLE _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap‖ * ‖f‖ :=
      by rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.norm_rieszMeasure]; rfl
    _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := by
      apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (norm_nonneg f)
      exact (ContinuousLinearMap.opNorm_comp_le _ _).trans
        ((mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (LinearIsometry.norm_le_one _) (norm_nonneg _)).trans (by rw [mul_one]))
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ :=
      mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg f)

calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖ = ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y f‖ := by
      simp [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure]
    _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := le_opNorm (cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y) f
    _ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound x y) (norm_nonneg f)
